---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a concrete improvement for Mediabot v3
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Feature summary

Describe the improvement you would like to see in Mediabot.

## Motivation

What problem would this feature solve?

Who would benefit from it?

## Feature type

Select the most relevant category:

* [ ] New IRC command
* [ ] Existing command improvement
* [ ] Plugin or scripting feature
* [ ] Partyline or administration
* [ ] URL or media handling
* [ ] Radio feature
* [ ] Metrics, monitoring or logging
* [ ] Installation or configuration
* [ ] Documentation
* [ ] Testing
* [ ] Other

## Proposed behavior

Describe how the feature should work.

Include example commands, IRC output or configuration when useful.

```text
Example:
m command argument
Expected bot response
```

## Alternatives considered

Describe any workaround or alternative approach you have considered.

## Compatibility and impact

Could this affect existing commands, configuration, database data or current installations?

* [ ] No known compatibility impact
* [ ] Configuration change may be required
* [ ] Database change may be required
* [ ] Existing behavior may change
* [ ] I am not sure

## Contribution

Would you be interested in helping with this feature?

* [ ] I can help test it
* [ ] I can help document it
* [ ] I can submit code
* [ ] I only want to suggest the idea

## Additional context

Add examples, screenshots, links or any other useful details.

## Checklist

* [ ] I searched existing Issues and Discussions.
* [ ] This is a concrete feature request, not a support question.
* [ ] I described the expected behavior.
* [ ] I removed passwords, tokens and private information.
